15-12-9

Part 1:
6 sets:
1 Snatch Pull
2 High Hang Snatch
40-50%

Part 2:
Snatch Pull
Below the Snatch

Part 3:
From Blocks
Clean
Jerk

Part 5:
3-4 sets:
10 BB Squat Jump 35-45% from Back squat
1 min rest
